File path: National_College_Entrance_Examination_Physics_(Science_Comprehensive)/National_College_Entrance_Examination_Physics_(Science_Comprehensive)_Sheet2.csv
Table description: This table provides a detailed breakdown of the 2014 National College Entrance Examination Physics Section of the Comprehensive Science Test Paper II, specifically focusing on the two-way specification table. It includes categories such as question types (multiple choice, optional exam questions, experiment questions, calculation problems), knowledge content from mandatory and elective courses, ability requirements, and difficulty levels. Each category is further detailed with specific examples and difficulty coefficients, which help in understanding the complexity and distribution of the exam content. This table can be used by educators to prepare students for the exam, by researchers to analyze the structure and difficulty of the test, and by policymakers to evaluate the standards of the examination.

Table description: This table provides a detailed breakdown of the 2014 National College Entrance Examination Physics Section of the Comprehensive Science Test Paper II, specifically focusing on the two-way specification table. It includes categories such as question types (multiple choice, optional exam questions, experiment questions, calculation problems), knowledge content from mandatory and elective courses, ability requirements, and difficulty levels. Each category is further detailed with specific examples and difficulty coefficients, which help in understanding the complexity and distribution of the exam content. This table can be used by educators to prepare students for the exam, by researchers to analyze the structure and difficulty of the test, and by policymakers to evaluate the standards of the examination.

It also outlines the knowledge content required for mandatory and elective courses, ability requirements, and difficulty levels. The table can be used to understand the structure and content of the exam, assess the difficulty of different sections, and prepare students for the examination by focusing on key areas and skills.
